description: Configure Jitsi Meet for a distraction-free 'Focus Mode'. Set the application name to 'ExamPortal' and configure the toolbar to include only the following buttons: 'microphone', 'camera', 'desktop', 'fullscreen', 'hangup', 'raisehand', 'chat', and 'tileview'. Save a screenshot of the simplified toolbar to ~/Documents/focus_mode_toolbar.png and a screenshot showing the 'ExamPortal' branding to ~/Documents/focus_mode_branding.png.
